original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of a dark, disc-shaped object hovering or resting near a body of water, with trees visible in the foreground and background.
black-and-white photograph of a disc-shaped object hovering in the sky above a tree line.

large black-and-white photograph of a metallic, disc-shaped object with a raised central dome. The object is tilted, showing its underside, and appears to be hovering against a cloudy sky over a dark, tree-lined horizon.

elements.description: A small rectangular black-and-white photograph on the left page showing one dark, disc-shaped flying saucer hovering in the sky above a tree line.
A small rectangular black-and-white photograph on the left page showing one dark, disc-shaped flying saucer hovering in the sky above a tree line.
A large black-and-white photograph on the right page showing one light-colored, disc-shaped flying saucer hovering in the sky above a dense forest of evergreen trees.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content: black-and-white photographs of disc-shaped objects hovering above a tree line, though Description A mentions a third image of a metallic disc with a raised dome not present in Description B.
